title: microseris callicarpha
intro: Microseris callicarpha, also known as Calico Hawksbeard, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which have been employed to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Microseris callicarpha include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are often used topically to soothe skin irritations and internally to reduce inflammation.
